query:
-- Check the 8 unmatched billing items
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceDate
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
ORDER BY bi.contactName;

WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
ORDER BY bi.contactName;
